ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square miles */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the neighborhood was established */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the neighborhood, such as a community center phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Homicide, Rape) */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., Violent, Property) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "legal_code" TEXT /* Legal code or statute associated with the crime */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalty for the crime */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Average frequency of the crime per year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the crime type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the crime occurred */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the crime occurred */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of the day the crime occurred (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the crime data (e.g., police report, community tip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., law enforcement, city official, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_crime_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime rate was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the crime rate data (e.g., police department, census) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the crime rate data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_crime_rates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_crime_rates_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime trend */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the crime rate (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., 95%) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., statistical analysis, expert opinion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_heatmaps" (
  "heatmap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime heatmap */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "heatmap_data" TEXT /* Heatmap data (e.g., latitude, longitude, crime rate) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the heatmap data was generated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the heatmap data (e.g., police reports, community tips) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the heatmap data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heatmap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_heatmaps_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_heatmaps_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the crime report was filed */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the crime report (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who filed the report */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number assigned to the crime report */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the neighborhood where the crime occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime prediction */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Predicted crime rate */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., machine learning, statistical model) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 90%) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction data (e.g., historical data, expert opinion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_predictions_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_predictions_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood boundary */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "boundary_data" TEXT /* Boundary data (e.g., polygon coordinates) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the boundary data (e.g., city planning department) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the boundary data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_boundaries_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_density" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime density */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "density" REAL /* Crime density per square mile */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime density was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the crime density data (e.g., police reports, census) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the crime density data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_density_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_density_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime correlation */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first crime type */,
  "crime_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second crime type */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the two crime types */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the correlation data (e.g., statistical analysis, expert opinion) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the correlation data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_correlations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_correlations_crime_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id1") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_correlations_crime_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id2") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)
